name: New Brickyard Currency Exchange
description_short: New Brickyard Currency Exchange offers check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and currency exchange services at their Chicago location on N Narragansett Street.
description_long:
New Brickyard Currency Exchange is a check-cashing and currency exchange service located in Chicago, Illinois on the North Side. The business operates as part of the Currency Exchange Association and serves the local community with extended operating hours throughout the week. The company is positioned as a financial services provider for consumers who need quick access to cash and basic transaction services without a traditional bank account.

The company provides check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, bill payment services, and currency exchange capabilities. These services are designed to serve unbanked and underbanked consumers who need immediate access to funds or require international money transfer capabilities. The business maintains a physical storefront location with staff available to process transactions during operating hours.

New Brickyard CE distinguishes itself through extended weekday hours (8 AM–9 PM Monday through Friday) and weekend accessibility (8 AM–7 PM Saturday, 9 AM–6 PM Sunday), making services available outside traditional banking hours. The business operates in English and maintains a straightforward service model focused on essential financial transactions rather than credit products or lending.

The company has limited online presence beyond directory listings and does not advertise specific fee structures, exchange rates, or service details on their associated website. As a check-cashing service, they serve a necessary function for consumers without bank accounts but represent a higher-cost alternative to traditional banking for routine financial transactions. No information is provided regarding licensing, regulatory compliance, or customer service ratings.
pros: Extended weekday hours (8 AM–9 PM Monday–Friday) provide access outside traditional banking hours
Weekend service availability (Saturday 8 AM–7 PM, Sunday 9 AM–6 PM) serves working consumers
Physical storefront location on accessible North Narragansett Street in Chicago
Offers multiple services including check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and currency exchange in one location
Direct phone contact available (773-237-0999) for customer inquiries
English-language service support for diverse customer base
cons: No fee schedule or pricing information disclosed on website, making true cost comparison difficult
Check cashing services typically charge higher fees than traditional bank accounts, particularly for non-customers
Limited online presence and no digital service options—requires in-person visit for all transactions
No information provided regarding currency exchange rates or competitiveness versus other providers
No customer reviews, ratings, or service quality indicators available on associated website
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked Chicago residents who need immediate check cashing without a bank account
International customers or immigrants needing currency exchange and wire transfer services
Consumers working non-traditional hours who need access to financial services outside bank operating hours
diagnosis: New Brickyard Currency Exchange is best suited for Chicago-area residents without traditional bank accounts who need quick check cashing, money orders, or international wire transfer services. The main caveat is that check-cashing services typically charge higher fees than banks and lack transparency regarding specific rates and fees, making it important to compare pricing with alternatives before use.
